requirement_topic.en: EMC Requirements for EV Chargers in Uzbekistan (IEC 61000 / GOST Equivalents)
requirement_topic.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦电动汽车充电设备电磁兼容要求（IEC 61000/GOST等效）
requirement_topic.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦電動汽車充電設備電磁相容要求（IEC 61000/GOST等效）

summary.en: EV chargers with power electronics, controls, communication modules, contactors, metering, and network interfaces are subject to electromagnetic compatibility review in Uzbekistan under O'zstandart mandatory conformity requirements. The applicable references are IEC 61000 series EMC standards and harmonised GOST equivalents as adopted by O'zstandart. The Uzbekistan route should confirm emissions, immunity, surge, conducted disturbance, radiated disturbance, harmonic, flicker, and installation assumptions for the final charger cabinet and cable set.
summary.zh: 带有电力电子、控制器、通信模块、接触器、计量和网络接口的电动汽车充电设备在乌兹别克斯坦依据O'zstandart强制合格要求须接受电磁兼容审查。适用参照为O'zstandart采纳的IEC 61000系列电磁兼容标准及协调化GOST等效标准。乌兹别克斯坦路径应确认最终充电柜和线缆组合的发射、抗扰度、浪涌、传导骚扰、辐射骚扰、谐波、闪变和安装假设。
summary.zht: 帶有電力電子、控制器、通訊模組、接觸器、計量和網路介面的電動汽車充電設備在烏茲別克斯坦依據O'zstandart強制合格要求須接受電磁相容審查。適用參照為O'zstandart採納的IEC 61000系列電磁相容標準及協調化GOST等效標準。烏茲別克斯坦路徑應確認最終充電櫃和線纜組合的發射、抗擾度、浪湧、傳導騷擾、輻射騷擾、諧波、閃變和安裝假設。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000 series EMC standards as referenced or adopted by O'zstandart
GOST EMC standards harmonised in Uzbekistan where applicable
O'zstandart conformity requirements for electrical equipment EMC
IEC 61851-1 EMC clauses for EV conductive charging systems

summary.en: China dossiers may include GB/T 18487.1-2023 EMC clauses, GB/T 17626 series immunity tests, GB/T 9254 / CISPR-type emission reports where used, and charger-level EMC reports. These should be checked against the Uzbekistan O'zstandart route, accepted standards list, operating voltage, cable length, enclosure, and communication options.
summary.zh: 中国资料可能包括GB/T 18487.1-2023电磁兼容条款、GB/T 17626系列抗扰度测试、使用时的GB/T 9254或CISPR类发射报告以及整机EMC报告。应将其与乌兹别克斯坦O'zstandart路径、认可标准清单、工作电压、线缆长度、外壳和通信选项逐项核对。
summary.zht: 中國資料可能包括GB/T 18487.1-2023電磁相容條款、GB/T 17626系列抗擾度測試、使用時的GB/T 9254或CISPR類發射報告以及整機EMC報告。應將其與烏茲別克斯坦O'zstandart路徑、認可標準清單、工作電壓、線纜長度、外殼和通訊選項逐項核對。

gap.en: Map Chinese EMC reports to O'zstandart accepted IEC 61000 / GOST EMC clauses and retest if the final Uzbekistan SKU differs in cable harness, enclosure, power module, modem, payment terminal, RFID reader, or software-controlled operating mode.
gap.zh: 应将中国EMC报告映射至O'zstandart认可的IEC 61000/GOST EMC条款；若乌兹别克斯坦最终SKU在线束、外壳、功率模块、调制解调器、支付终端、RFID读卡器或软件控制运行模式上不同，应补充测试。
gap.zht: 應將中國EMC報告映射至O'zstandart認可的IEC 61000/GOST EMC條款；若烏茲別克斯坦最終SKU在線束、外殼、功率模組、數據機、支付終端、RFID讀卡器或軟體控制運行模式上不同，應補充測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger is within O'zstandart EMC conformity scope and is placed on the Uzbekistan market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or procurement-specific depending on Chinese product category, CCC / CQC / GB scope, and project requirements

source.publisher: O'zstandart — Agency for Technical Regulation and Metrology of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC reports from China are not automatically sufficient for Uzbekistan. Confirm the O'zstandart EMC conformity route under IEC 61000 / GOST references and retest configuration-sensitive charger variants where needed.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国EMC报告并不自动满足乌兹别克斯坦要求。应确认O'zstandart依据IEC 61000/GOST参照的EMC合格评定路径，并在需要时对配置敏感的充电设备变体补充测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國EMC報告並不自動滿足烏茲別克斯坦要求。應確認O'zstandart依據IEC 61000/GOST參照的EMC合格評定路徑，並在需要時對配置敏感的充電設備變體補充測試。
